footer.description: A mutual aid campaign to address the financial crisis facing Korean artists.
footer.guide: Visit our links and contact section for information about online exhibitions and purchases.

home.heroTitle:
Online Exhibition Now Open
Artworks Available for Purchase
home.heroDescription:
84.9% of Korean artists are excluded from primary banking.
Your support and purchases
become a strong pillar for artists.
home.shareDescription: Join SAF 2026, a special online exhibition to raise mutual aid funds for Korean artists.
home.joinMemberDesc: Become a member of Korea Smart Cooperative and support the mutual aid fund for artists.
home.buyArtworkDesc: Support participating artists by purchasing their work.
home.archiveDesc: Explore the records and achievements of past exhibitions.
home.problemFinancialDesc: Artists struggle to prove regular income, leading to rejection from bank loans. Without a credit score, they are completely excluded from the financial system.
home.problemDebtDesc: With nowhere to borrow, artists rely on credit card loans and cash advances with interest rates approaching 20% annually.
home.problemDamageDesc: This hinders artists' creative activities and threatens the sustainability of the art ecosystem.
home.problemSolutionDesc: Mutual aid loans built on the fund of <orgLink>Korea Smart Cooperative</orgLink> and the trust of partner financial institutions are the answer.
home.solutionTrustDesc: When <orgLink>Korea Smart Cooperative</orgLink> builds a fund, partner financial institutions lend up to 7 times that amount to artists at low interest rates.
home.solutionProof: Over 95% of artists who received support have been faithfully repaying their loans. This proves that when given access to a trustworthy financial system, artists act responsibly.
home.metaTitle: SAF 2026 - Special Exhibition for Artist Mutual Aid Fund
home.metaDescription: SAF 2026 is a special online exhibition connecting co-op membership and artwork purchases to raise mutual aid loan funds for artists. Help provide a stable creative environment for financially excluded artists.
home.ogDescription: A special exhibition to raise mutual aid funds for Korean artists. Join the solidarity by becoming a co-op member and purchasing artworks.
home.twitterDescription: Join SAF 2026, a special exhibition raising mutual aid loan funds for artists.
